summary: Added definitions/agent_identity with pattern ^[a-z][a-z0-9-]*/claude-[a-z0-9.-]+@[a-z0-9.-]+\.local$ to all three schemas. 6 total placements: artifact (2), certificate (3), defect (1). All $ref targets resolve. P0 self-attestation branches intact.
residual_limitations: Pattern enforces identity FORMAT only — not that asserted role/model corresponds to the actual executing agent
Layer-3: different tier, same Anthropic family
